center.name: 勃兰登堡
center.summary: 勃兰登堡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鵰鴞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Germany, the eagle-owl can be found in large but highly discontinuous areas, mostly in the south and central areas but is almost entirely absent in areas such as Brandenburg

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Germany, the eagle-owl can be found in large but highly discontinuous areas, mostly in the south and central areas but is almost entirely absent in areas such as Brandenburg
